name: the-evolving-self-a-psychology-for-the-third-millennium
description: Mihaly Csikszentmihalyi's exploration of how consciousness evolves — from flow and psychic entropy to the autotelic self and the future of human evolution.
useCase: Understand how consciousness and the self evolve through flow, attention cultivation, and complexity — toward a more meaningful and integrated life.
knownRisks: Dense and theoretical — not a quick read
Some concepts overlap with Csikszentmihalyi's other works
